name: ice-scripture-engine
description: Development tools for the I.C.E. Manifest V3 scripture study extension.

scripts.qa:matthew-pages: npm run qa:matthew1 && npm run qa:matthew2 && npm run qa:matthew3
scripts.review:matthew5: npm run qa:matthew5 && node qa/generate-study-panel-report.js qa-output/latest-matthew5-qa-bundle.json QA_REPORTS/latest-study-panel-report.md
scripts.review:matthew1: npm run qa:matthew1 && node qa/generate-study-panel-report.js qa-output/latest-qa-bundle.json QA_REPORTS/latest-study-panel-report.md
scripts.review:matthew3: npm run qa:matthew3 && node qa/generate-study-panel-report.js qa-output/latest-matthew3-qa-bundle.json QA_REPORTS/latest-study-panel-report.md
